title: Error Response
description: Standard error response body returned by the Global Error Handling Middleware for all API error responses.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g., USER_NOT_FOUND, VALIDATION_FAILED). Stable across releases — safe for programmatic dispatch.

message.description: Human-readable error message. Sanitized in production — never contains stack traces or raw Go error strings.

request_id.description: Correlation ID matching the X-Request-Id response header. Use when contacting support or searching logs.

details.description: Per-field validation details. Only present when code is VALIDATION_FAILED. Omitted otherwise.

field.description: The JSON field name (snake_case) that failed validation.

message.description: Human-readable description of the validation failure.
examples: username must be at least 3 characters
